en: Well, you know, it's a long shot. Did you think it would happen?
No. I knew it was a long shot. But what are you gonna do?
I'll tell you what you do. You're gonna get back out there.
You can't date now. How do you even make a move in this climate?
Plus, I got that sexual harassment thing from the assistant.
And I'm old and bald. Old and bald? Yeah.
ko: 나는 나이가 많고 대머리야. 나이가 많고 대머리? 그래. 그건 아무 의미 없어.

en: Means nothing. Please. Are you kidding? You're rich!
You think rich beats old and bald?
ko: 부자가 나이 많고 대머리보다 더 낫다고 생각해?

en: You could have mutton chops and wear a cartoon tie of Felix the Cat.
ko: 너는 양쪽 수염을 기르고 만화 넥타이를 매고

en: Some old-timey cartoon. You can paint them blue and wear an Abe Lincoln hat.
ko: 그것들을 파란색으로 칠하고 에이브 링컨 모자를 쓸 수 있어.

en: You'll be fine. Really? Trust me. Yeah.
Okay. I'm gonna get back out there. I gotta ask you something.
The other night at poker, that invitation, it didn't get lost?
No, of course not. You made that whole thing up? Yeah, I totally made it up.
Oh, you're good. Blame it on the mailman. Blame it on the mailman?
Yeah. Jeffrey! Oh. Oh, hi, lad!
ko: 제프리! 오, 안녕, 친구. 오, 안녕하세요.

en: Oh, hello! I didn't know you were here. I am here!
ko: 네가 여기 있는 줄 몰랐어. 나는 여기 있어. 응.
